title: Bridge Essay: Individual differences in interoceptive accuracy and prediction error in motor functional neurological disorders: A DTI study.
concept: Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.
**Phase context:** Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

**Individual differences in interoceptive accuracy and prediction error in motor functional neurological disorders: A DTI study.** — Hum Brain Mapp (2021). DOI: 10.1002/hbm.25304. PMID: 33615622. In motor functional neurological disorders (mFND), relationships between interoception (a construct of high theoretical relevance to its pathophysiology) and neuroanatomy have not been previously investigated. This study characterized white matter in mFND patients compared to healthy controls (HCs), and investigated associations between fiber bundle integrity and cardiac interoception.
